summary.en: Cameroon does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC directive, but EMC performance is addressed through ANOR-adopted IEC standards for electromagnetic emission and immunity and, for cordless tools with radio functions, through ART radio-spectrum rules. Motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies should meet the adopted IEC emission and immunity expectations so they do not cause harmful interference on the local network.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆没有欧盟式的独立 EMC 指令，但电磁兼容性能通过 ANOR 采用的电磁发射与抗扰度 IEC 标准处理，对于带无线电功能的无绳工具，还通过 ART 无线电频谱规则处理。电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源应满足所采用 IEC 的发射与抗扰度预期，避免在当地网络造成有害干扰。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式的獨立 EMC 指令，但電磁相容性能通過 ANOR 採用的電磁發射與抗擾度 IEC 標準處理，對於帶無線電功能的無繩工具，還通過 ART 無線電頻譜規則處理。電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源應滿足所採用 IEC 的發射與抗擾度預期，避免在當地網絡造成有害干擾。

standards_or_laws: ANOR-adopted IEC electromagnetic emission and immunity standards for motor-operated tools and chargers
ART (Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications) radio-spectrum rules for cordless tools with radio functions
PECAE conformity and import-inspection programme for evidence handling

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC test reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and any radio module still need review against the ANOR-adopted IEC references and, for radio functions, ART rules.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 测试报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及任何无线电模块，仍需对照 ANOR 采用的 IEC 引用复核，无线电功能还需对照 ART 规则。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 測試報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及任何無線電模組，仍需對照 ANOR 採用的 IEC 引用覆核，無線電功能還需對照 ART 規則。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards (GB/T 9254 / equivalent) and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or any radio module. For Cameroon the EMC evidence should reflect the actual marketed configuration, map to the adopted IEC reference, and trigger a separate ART check whenever the cordless tool contains a radio transmitter.
gap.zh: 常见差距是报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或任何无线电模块。对喀麦隆而言，EMC 证据应反映实际销售配置，映射到采用的 IEC 引用，并在无绳工具含无线电发射器时另行触发 ART 检查。
gap.zht: 常見差距是報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或任何無線電模組。對喀麥隆而言，EMC 證據應反映實際銷售配置，映射到採用的 IEC 引用，並在無繩工具含無線電發射器時另行觸發 ART 檢查。

target.en: There is no EU-style standalone EMC directive in Cameroon; EMC expectations flow through ANOR-adopted IEC standards within the PECAE programme, and radio functions are subject to mandatory ART approval. The exact instruments should be confirmed with ANOR and ART for the specific tool.
target.zh: 喀麦隆没有欧盟式独立 EMC 指令；EMC 预期通过 PECAE 程序内 ANOR 采用的 IEC 标准体现，无线电功能须经 ART 强制批准。具体文件应就该工具向 ANOR 与 ART 确认。
target.zht: 喀麥隆沒有歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令；EMC 預期通過 PECAE 程序內 ANOR 採用的 IEC 標準體現，無線電功能須經 ART 強制批准。具體文件應就該工具向 ANOR 與 ART 確認。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but Cameroon acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, adopted-standard mapping, and ART treatment of any radio module.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但喀麦隆接受性取决于范围、限值、配置、采用标准映射及任何无线电模块的 ART 处理。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但喀麥隆接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置、採用標準映射及任何無線電模組的 ART 處理。

source.publisher: Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications (ART), Cameroon

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Cameroon-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, maps to the ANOR-adopted IEC references, and any cordless radio function is cleared separately under ART rules.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售工具系统、映射到 ANOR 采用的 IEC 引用，并对任何无绳无线电功能按 ART 规则单独放行之前，不能视为喀麦隆就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售工具系統、映射到 ANOR 採用的 IEC 引用，並對任何無繩無線電功能按 ART 規則單獨放行之前，不能視為喀麥隆就緒。
